UIDescription.NativeString: Prove your skill in this competitive mode!  During each match, you'll earn points by either achieving high placements or eliminating multiple opponents.  As you gain points, you'll compete against tougher opponents with similar scores.
Pair up with a buddy and take everyone else down.
